title: Respect Affects Gameplay
description:
GitHub: https://github.com/xiting910/RespectAffectsGameplay 

Only marks the game as modded when gameplay-affecting mods are installed. Mods with 'affects_gameplay': false no longer separate save files or block vanilla multiplayer. 

只在实际影响游戏玩法的 Mod 加载时才标记游戏为 modded 状态。affects_gameplay: false 的 Mod 不再隔离存档或阻止原版联机。
